name: windows-tools
description: Windows process, port, service, PowerShell, proxy, and local environment helper capabilities.

tools.name: windows_find_port
tools.description: Find the process using a local TCP port.

tools.name: system_processes
tools.description: List local processes with optional filtering.

tools.name: system_find_process
tools.description: Find a process by PID, name, command, or session.

tools.name: system_kill_process_confirmed
tools.description: Stop a process after owner-profile opt-in and exact confirmation phrase.

tools.name: windows_proxy_status
tools.description: Inspect common local proxy environment variables and ports.
